lead.ad_text:
Traditional recipes like Grandma used to make
STEPH & JENNY'S KITCHEN
You can't beat the traditional favourites!
Our meals are made in small batches using the freshest ingredients, creating tasty wholesome meals. They are delivered to your door chilled the very same day, served as individual portions and microwave friendly. We offer weekly changing menus with options for freshly baked cakes. Where applicable, meals will be served with a side of potatoes and fresh vegetables.
OUR CHOICES INCLUDE:
Shepherds/cottage pie
Chicken and leek hotpot
Sausage casserole
Pasta bolognese
Braised beef and onions
Bacon hotpot
...and much more!
10% DISCOUNT ON ORDERS OVER £15
ALL MEALS £5.95 EACH
FREE DELIVERY ON ORDERS OVER £15
PLEASE CONTACT STEPH FOR MORE INFORMATION: 07813 923595
Based in Kiveton
lead.tagline: Traditional recipes like Grandma used to make
trust_points: Made in small batches using the freshest ingredients
Delivered to your door chilled the very same day
lead.logo_note: chef-hat circle logo; bottom half of asset

instructions.what_to_build: ONE complete, self-contained single-page website for the business in this manifest. One file: <slug>.html, ALL CSS/JS inline, no external anything. This is a trial website that will be sold to the business owner — it must look like a top design agency built it specifically for this business.
instructions.assets_inline: lead.logo_datauri is the business's real logo (PNG data URI) — put it in the hero as . lead.photo_datauri is a professional photo of this trade (JPEG data URI) — display it large (hero background with palette-tinted overlay, or split hero). Both strings are complete; paste them as-is. Do not fetch anything else.
instructions.brand_colours: lead.palette[] is extracted from the logo. The page MUST look like the logo's brand: the most saturated palette colour drives the header, buttons and accents; the rest are supporting tones and background tints. Logo sits on a background it reads cleanly against (add a light card behind it if needed).
instructions.content: Build copy from lead.ad_text / services[] / tagline / trust_points[] (all transcribed from their real printed advert). Services as designed cards with a short benefit line each. Trust points as a strip. Friendly professional Yorkshire tone. Never invent specific claims, prices, reviews, certifications, or contact details.
instructions.structure: Sticky header (business name + call button) / hero (logo, tagline or one-line pitch, phone CTA with tel:) / services cards / why-choose-us trust strip / service area (town + nearby areas) / contact (form + phone) / footer '<business> — <town>, <county>'.
instructions.contact_form: Form POSTs to the formspree URL: fields name, phone, message + hidden input name='_subject' value='<business> enquiry'.
instructions.craft: Large expressive typography (system stacks, strong weights), layered gradients from the palette, one trade-specific CSS/SVG decorative motif, hover states, subtle scroll-reveal animations (CSS only, respect prefers-reduced-motion), AA contrast, mobile-first. No flat centred-text template.
instructions.self_check: Before finishing, verify every item in acceptance_checklist. If any item fails, fix it before delivering.
instructions.deliverable: Return the single <slug>.html file as a downloadable file.

acceptance_checklist: The hero shows the real logo: an whose src is EXACTLY the provided logo_datauri string
The trade photo (photo_datauri) is displayed large in the hero or a main section
Header, buttons and accents visibly use the palette[] colours taken from the logo — logo and page look like one brand
Every service in services[] appears, as styled cards (not a plain bullet list)
The only phone numbers on the page are the manifest's phone (and landline); tel: links work; phone CTA visible without scrolling on mobile
Email shown only if provided, exactly as written; no invented claims, prices, reviews or certifications
Contact form POSTs to the formspree URL with fields name, phone, message and hidden _subject
Page is one self-contained .html file: no external fonts/scripts/images, works offline
Distinct, designed layout: layered hero, trade-specific CSS/SVG motif, hover states, subtle CSS-only animations, prefers-reduced-motion respected
<title> is '<business> | <category> in <town>' and there is a meta description
